stages.title: Idea Discovery And Research Question
stages.description: Find topics, generate hypotheses, check novelty, and turn broad interests into researchable questions.
stages.description_zh: 用于发现研究方向、生成假设、初步判断创新性，并把宽泛想法转化为可执行的研究问题。
queries: research ideation ai scientist hypothesis generation in:name,description,readme
research ideas literature discovery hypothesis in:name,description,readme

stages.title: Literature Search And Reading
stages.description: Search papers, build reading lists, summarize PDFs, and organize literature review inputs.
stages.description_zh: 用于检索论文、整理阅读列表、总结 PDF，并为 related work 和综述搭建资料库。
queries: academic literature review arxiv semantic scholar in:name,description,readme
paper search literature review pubmed arxiv in:name,description,readme

stages.title: Citation Management And Source Verification
stages.description: Manage BibTeX, DOI metadata, citation graphs, references, and hallucination checks.
stages.description_zh: 用于管理 BibTeX、DOI、参考文献元数据，检查引用错误、来源缺失和伪造引用风险。
queries: bibtex citation in:name,description,readme
zotero citation in:name,description,readme
doi crossref reference in:name,description,readme
bibliography references paper in:name,description,readme
citation reference academic in:name,description,readme

stages.title: Experiment Execution And Reproducibility
stages.description: Run experiments, track results, manage datasets, and keep work reproducible.
stages.description_zh: 用于运行实验、记录结果、管理数据和模型版本，并保持论文实验可复现。
queries: mlflow wandb dvc sacred experiment tracking in:name,description,readme
reproducible research workflow experiment pipeline in:name,description,readme
machine learning experiment manager reproducibility in:name,description,readme

stages.title: Analysis, Statistics, Figures And Tables
stages.title_zh: 数据分析、统计、图表与表格
stages.description: Analyze data, create publication-quality figures, tables, schematics, and statistical reports.
stages.description_zh: 用于完成统计分析、可视化、论文级图表、表格和实验结果报告。
queries: scientific visualization publication figures matplotlib in:name,description,readme
publication quality plots statistics research paper in:name,description,readme

stages.title: Paper Writing And Drafting
stages.description: Draft abstracts, related work, methods, results, discussion, and full manuscripts.
stages.description_zh: 用于撰写摘要、引言、相关工作、方法、结果、讨论以及完整论文初稿。
queries: academic paper writing latex docx ai in:name,description,readme
research paper writing skill manuscript in:name,description,readme

stages.title: Peer Review, Self Review And Revision
stages.description: Review manuscripts, score quality, generate rebuttals, and plan revisions.
stages.description_zh: 用于模拟审稿、质量评分、发现论文缺陷、生成 rebuttal 和修改路线图。
queries: peer review academic paper reviewer in:name,description,readme
paper review rebuttal revision manuscript in:name,description,readme
manuscript review academic quality checklist in:name,description,readme

stages.title: LaTeX, Word Formatting And Submission
stages.description: Prepare LaTeX templates, DOCX/PDF exports, journal formatting, camera-ready packages, and submission checks.
stages.description_zh: 用于准备 LaTeX/Word 模板、PDF/DOCX 导出、期刊会议格式检查和最终投稿包。
queries: latex template journal conference paper in:name,description,readme
docx latex paper submission template academic in:name,description,readme
overleaf latex manuscript template thesis in:name,description,readme

05-analysis-figures.description: This tutorial is a companion volume of Matlab versionm but add more. Main objective is the transference of know-how in practical applications and management of statistical tools commonly used to explore meteorological time series, focusing on applications to study issues related with the climate variability and climate change. This tutorial starts with some basic statistic for time series analysis as estimation of means, anomalies, standard deviation, correlations, arriving the estimation of particular climate indexes (Niño 3), detrending single time series and decomposition of time series, filtering, interpolation of climate variables on regular or irregular grids, leading modes of climate variability (EOF or HHT), signal processing in the climate system (spectral and wavelet analysis). In addition, this tutorial also deals with different data formats such as CSV, NetCDF, Binary, and matlab'mat, etc. It is assumed that you have basic knowledge and understanding of statistics and Python.
